# Acupuncture Monique St-Arnault

> Acupuncture clinic in Montreal (Rosemont / Lacordaire area), Quebec, Canada. Monique St-Arnault has practiced traditional Chinese medicine and acupuncture since 1990 — over 35 years and more than 30,000 treatments — with a practical internship completed in Shanghai in 1991. Personalized care for pain, stress, burnout, anxiety, digestion, seasonal allergies, women's health, and overall balance. Site is bilingual: French (default) and English under /en/.

Key facts:
- Practitioner: Monique St-Arnault, acupuncturist since 1990 (acupressure training, then acupuncture; Shanghai internship 1991; background in high-level sports, physical education and Tai Chi)
- Location: Rosemont & Lacordaire, Montreal, Quebec, Canada, H1M 2N1
- Phone (appointments): +1 (514) 778-7975 — booking is done **by phone** (voicemail/text answered personally); call hours Monday–Friday, 9:00–20:00
- Email: acumsta@hotmail.com
- Languages: French and English
- Services: acupuncture, gua sha & cupping, moxibustion, energy dietetics (Chinese dietary therapy), facial acupuncture, mind & relaxation care

## Main pages (French)

- [Accueil](https://acupuncturemoniquestarnault.com/): services, approach, practitioner background, booking information
- [Acupuncture sportive](https://acupuncturemoniquestarnault.com/sport/): sports acupuncture — tendinitis, epicondylitis, sprains, overuse and recovery for climbing (a strong focus), running, cycling, racquet sports, gymnastics and more
- [Blog](https://acupuncturemoniquestarnault.com/blog/): articles on acupuncture and traditional Chinese medicine

## Main pages (English)

- [Home](https://acupuncturemoniquestarnault.com/en/): services, approach, practitioner background, booking information
- [Sports Acupuncture](https://acupuncturemoniquestarnault.com/en/sport/): sports acupuncture — tendinitis, epicondylitis, sprains, overuse and recovery for climbing (a strong focus), running, cycling, racquet sports, gymnastics and more
- [Blog](https://acupuncturemoniquestarnault.com/en/blog/): articles in English

## Articles

- [Les allergies du printemps](https://acupuncturemoniquestarnault.com/blog/les-allergies-du-printemps/) ([EN](https://acupuncturemoniquestarnault.com/en/blog/les-allergies-du-printemps/)): how Chinese medicine views seasonal allergies — Lung, Kidney and Spleen energy, diet, and individualized acupuncture support
- [Le printemps, la saison du mouvement de l'élément Bois](https://acupuncturemoniquestarnault.com/blog/le-printemps/) ([EN](https://acupuncturemoniquestarnault.com/en/blog/le-printemps/)): the Wood element, the five-element generation and control cycles, stress, and seasonal balance
- [Le Tao](https://acupuncturemoniquestarnault.com/blog/le-tao/) ([EN](https://acupuncturemoniquestarnault.com/en/blog/le-tao/)): introduction to Taoism, Qi, yin/yang and the five elements as the foundation of Chinese medicine
